/usr/bin/ar qc libblinkhash_eager.a CMakeFiles/blinkhash_eager.dir/Epoche.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blinkhash_eager.dir/hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blinkhash_eager.dir/inode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blinkhash_eager.dir/lnode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blinkhash_eager.dir/lnode_btree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blinkhash_eager.dir/lnode_hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blinkhash_eager.dir/tree.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libblinkhash_eager.a
